file_insights.purpose: Exclude files from Docker build context to reduce image size and build time
key_patterns: Git files excluded (.git, .gitignore)
Dependencies excluded (node_modules - will be installed fresh)
Build outputs excluded (dist, build, *.tsbuildinfo)
Environment files excluded (.env, .env.local)
Development files excluded (.vscode, .idea, linters, formatters)
Documentation specs excluded (API_CONTRACTS.md, BUSINESS_RULES.md, etc.)
Infrastructure files excluded (Dockerfile*, docker-compose*)
Secrets excluded (*.pem, *.key, credentials.json)
file_insights.observations: Comprehensive ignore file with well-organized sections; excludes specification documents to keep Docker image focused on runtime only

file_insights.purpose: Multi-stage Docker build configuration for E-Menum application
key_patterns: Stage 1 (deps): Installs dependencies with build tools for native modules
Stage 2 (builder): Compiles TypeScript, generates Prisma client, prunes devDependencies
Stage 3 (runner): Production-ready lightweight image with non-root user
Security: Non-root user 'emenum' (uid 1001) created and used
Health check: HTTP endpoint check on /health every 30s
Multi-stage optimization: Final image only contains production artifacts
Copied assets: dist, node_modules, prisma, public, locales, themes directories
file_insights.observations: Production-grade Dockerfile using alpine for minimal footprint; follows security best practices with non-root user; includes health checks for orchestration compatibility

key_patterns: Version 3.8: Compatible with Docker Compose v2+
Three services: app (Node), db (PostgreSQL 15), redis (Redis 7)
Service dependencies: App depends on db and redis with health checks
Environment configuration: JWT secrets, database URL, Redis URL with defaults
Volume management: postgres_data, redis_data, uploads directories
Health checks: Each service has health check configuration
Networking: Bridge network 'emenum-network' for inter-service communication
Restart policy: unless-stopped for all services
Port mappings: 3000 (app), 5432 (postgres), 6379 (redis)
Development override pattern documented for docker-compose.override.yml
file_insights.observations: Well-structured compose file with complete documentation; includes commented development override example; Redis configured with persistence and LRU eviction policy

patterns_discovered.description: Three-stage Dockerfile pattern: dependencies -> builder -> runner
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces final image size by excluding build dependencies; improves security by using minimal alpine base
patterns_discovered.implementation: Uses AS keywords to create deps, builder, and runner stages with selective COPY commands

patterns_discovered.description: Creates and uses non-root 'emenum' user with specific UID (1001) and GID (1001)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enforces principle of least privilege; prevents container breakouts from escalating to root
patterns_discovered.implementation: addgroup/adduser commands in runner stage, USER switch before CMD, chown on all copied files

patterns_discovered.description: Both Dockerfile and docker-compose define health checks using HTTP endpoint verification
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables orchestration systems to detect and handle unhealthy containers automatically
patterns_discovered.implementation: HEALTHCHECK in Dockerfile; healthcheck section in docker-compose for each service

patterns_discovered.description: docker-compose.yml uses depends_on with service_healthy condition
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures database and cache are fully initialized before app starts, not just containers created
patterns_discovered.implementation: depends_on section specifies condition: service_healthy for db and redis

patterns_discovered.description: Default values provided in docker-compose with ${VAR:-default-value} syntax for secrets
patterns_discovered.benefit: Secure production secrets not hardcoded; development defaults available for quick startup
patterns_discovered.implementation: JWT_SECRET and JWT_REFRESH_SECRET use default pattern for development; others set directly

patterns_discovered.description: 158-line file with 12+ categorized sections excluding development, testing, and documentation files
patterns_discovered.benefit: Significantly reduces Docker build context size; excludes specification documents from runtime images
patterns_discovered.implementation: Well-commented sections (Git, Dependencies, IDE, Specs) with clear inclusion/exclusion logic

patterns_discovered.description: Named volumes for persistent data (postgres_data, redis_data) and uploads directory
patterns_discovered.benefit: Data persistence across container restarts; proper isolation of application state
patterns_discovered.implementation: volumes section defines drivers; services mount these volumes with specific paths

gotchas_discovered.description: POSTGRES_PASSWORD set to 'password' - this is development placeholder but dangerous if deployed to production
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should be overridden with environment variable or secrets management; documentation recommends using .env files

gotchas_discovered.description: JWT_SECRET and JWT_REFRESH_SECRET have 'change-me' defaults - will allow unsafe authentication if not overridden
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Environment variables with ${VAR:-default} syntax correctly allows override, but instructions needed for production setup

gotchas_discovered.description: DATABASE_URL hardcoded as postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/emenum - hostname depends on service name resolution
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Works within compose network but wouldn't work if deployed separately; needs externalization

gotchas_discovered.issue: Development override file is documented but not provided
gotchas_discovered.description: Comments suggest creating docker-compose.override.yml for development but file is not included in commit
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Developers would need to create this manually; could be provided as docker-compose.dev.yml template

gotchas_discovered.issue: Health check dependencies may cause race conditions
gotchas_discovered.description: While depends_on with service_healthy is used, there's still potential timing issue between health check passing and service full readiness
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Retry logic in application code is still recommended; Prisma migrations might not complete before app starts

gotchas_discovered.issue: Redis maxmemory configured but no persistence urgency
gotchas_discovered.description: Redis configured with appendonly but maxmemory-policy is allkeys-lru - could lose session data under memory pressure
gotchas_discovered.consideration: For session cache this may be acceptable, but for queue persistence might need adjustment

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created production-ready Docker and Docker Compose configurations for E-Menum application
key_achievements: Multi-stage Dockerfile reduces image size and improves security
Non-root user implementation follows security best practices
docker-compose.yml provides complete development environment with PostgreSQL and Redis
Health checks enable proper container orchestration
Service dependencies ensure correct startup order
approach_outcome.production_readiness: medium-to-high (security credentials need environment-based override before production use)
approach_outcome.completeness: Fully functional but requires follow-up documentation on secrets management for production deployment

recommendations.recommendation: Create .env.example file documenting all required environment variables for production
recommendations.rationale: Developers need clear guidance on JWT_SECRET and database credentials that must be set before production deployment
recommendations.implementation: Create .env.example with all required variables from docker-compose.yml with production-strength placeholder hints

recommendations.recommendation: Add Docker deployment documentation including secrets management strategy
recommendations.rationale: Current code has 'change-me' placeholders that could be accidentally deployed; production teams need clear procedures
recommendations.implementation: Create DOCKER_DEPLOYMENT.md or similar with production checklist, secrets management, and environment setup

recommendations.rationale: Documented in comments but not provided; developers cannot easily set up hot-reload development environment
recommendations.implementation: Create docker-compose.override.yml with npm run dev command, volume mounts for source code, and debug logging

recommendations.recommendation: Implement database migration strategy for Docker startup
recommendations.rationale: Prisma schema is copied but migrations may not run automatically; app could start before database is ready
recommendations.implementation: Add entrypoint script or modify CMD to run 'npm run prisma:migrate:deploy' before app startup

recommendations.recommendation: Add logging service (e.g., optional elasticsearch/kibana stack) to docker-compose.yml
recommendations.rationale: Current setup has no centralized logging; logs from three services would be scattered across containers
recommendations.implementation: Add commented-out logging service example; document how to enable with override or environment variable

recommendations.recommendation: Create Docker image build and push workflow documentation
recommendations.rationale: Dockerfile exists but no guidance on how to build and push to registry for production
recommendations.implementation: Document docker build command, registry credentials, and image tagging strategy (e.g., latest, version-specific)

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding reverse proxy service (nginx) to docker-compose.yml
recommendations.rationale: Direct Node.js exposure on port 3000 lacks request routing, SSL termination, and static file serving optimization
recommendations.implementation: Add optional nginx service with SSL/TLS configuration example; document when to enable

recommendations.recommendation: Document APP_DOMAIN value and how it's used in application
recommendations.rationale: docker-compose.yml sets APP_DOMAIN: e-menum.net but unclear if this is environment-dependent
recommendations.implementation: Add configuration guide explaining which values should change per environment and how to override
